    <h1 {...{
      "id": "add-a-command-entrypoint"
    }}>{`Add a Command Entrypoint`}</h1>
    <p>{`Commands allow you to add a menu item directly to the Premiere user interface.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "overview"
    }}>{`Overview`}</h2>
    <p>{`As we have seen in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../concepts/panels-and-commands/index.md"
      }}>{`Panels & Commands`}</a>{` guide, commands can run any type of code, and even spin up a `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../concepts/panels-and-commands/index.md#modal-dialogs"
      }}>{`modal dialog UI`}</a>{` if necessary.`}</p>
    <p>{`They belong to their respective plugin in the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Window`}</strong>{` > `}<strong parentName="p">{`UXP Plugins`}</strong>{` menu.`}</p>
    <p><span parentName="p" {...{

            "sizes": "(max-width: 1280px) 100vw, 1280px",

            "srcSet": ["/uxp-premiere-pro/static/536dfb7a4ddf26404a719b639666192d/dd4a7/entrypoints--menu-items.png 320w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/536dfb7a4ddf26404a719b639666192d/0f09e/entrypoints--menu-items.png 640w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/536dfb7a4ddf26404a719b639666192d/bbbf7/entrypoints--menu-items.png 1280w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/536dfb7a4ddf26404a719b639666192d/ac7a9/entrypoints--menu-items.png 1920w", "/uxp-premiere-pro/static/536dfb7a4ddf26404a719b639666192d/6482f/entrypoints--menu-items.png 2500w"],

    <p>{`Adding a new command is a multi-step process.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "1-register-a-new-entrypoint"
    }}>{`1. Register a new Entrypoint`}</h2>
    <p>{`In your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` file, add an Entrypoint of type `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`"command"`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  // ...
  "entrypoints": [
    {
      "type": "command",
      "id": "myCommand",
      "label": "This is a Command"
    }
  ]
}
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert slots="text1" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`For the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../concepts/manifest/index.md#label"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`label`}</inlineCode></a>{` property, you can also use a `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../concepts/manifest/index.md#localizedstring"
      }}><inlineCode parentName="a">{`LocalizedString`}</inlineCode></a>{` to localize the command.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "2-associate-entrypoint-and-handler"
    }}>{`2. Associate Entrypoint and Handler`}</h2>
    <p>{`In your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`index.js`}</inlineCode>{` file, add a function to handle the command execution—i.e., when the user clicks on the command in the Premiere user interface.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`// index.js
function myCommandHandler() { // The function name is not important.
  console.log("Command invoked!");
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`There are two ways to associate an Entrypoint and its Handler.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "a-use-entrypointssetup"
    }}>{`A. Use `}<inlineCode parentName="h3">{`entrypoints.setup()`}</inlineCode></h3>
    <p>{`Complete `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`index.js`}</inlineCode>{` with the following code:`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="2" languages="JavaScript, JSON" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "indexjs"
    }}>{`index.js`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`const { entrypoints } = require("uxp");

function myCommandHandler() { console.log("Command invoked!"); }

entrypoints.setup({
  commands: {
    myCommand: myCommandHandler
  }
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "manifestjson"
    }}>{`manifest.json`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  // ...
  "entrypoints": [
    {
      "type": "command",
      "id": "myCommand",
      "label": "This is a Command"
    }
  ]
  // ...
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`As we have seen in the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "../../concepts/entrypoints/index.md#command-handlers"
      }}>{`Entrypoints concept guide`}</a>{`, the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`entrypoints.setup()`}</inlineCode>{` method has a variety of functions—one of which is to associate an commands with their respective handlers. Note that `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`myCommand`}</inlineCode>{` is the ID of the command Entrypoint we registered in the manifest.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert slots="text" variant="warning" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p><inlineCode parentName="p">{`entrypoints.setup()`}</inlineCode>{` `}<strong parentName="p">{`can be called only once`}</strong>{`; any subsequent calls will throw an error. If you need more entrypoints, add them all at once.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "b-use-moduleexports"
    }}>{`B. Use `}<inlineCode parentName="h3">{`module.exports`}</inlineCode></h3>
    <p>{`This method is especially useful for smaller plugins that `}<strong parentName="p">{`only contain command entrypoints`}</strong>{` that don't rely on UIs, therefore don't need an HTML file.`}</p>
    <p>{`If this is the case, set the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`main`}</inlineCode>{` property to the path of your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`index.js`}</inlineCode>{` file in your `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{`; then, export an object with a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`commands`}</inlineCode>{` property that maps the command IDs to their respective handlers in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`index.js`}</inlineCode>{` file.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="2" languages="JavaScript, JSON" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "indexjs-1"
    }}>{`index.js`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`module.exports = {
  commands: {
    myCommand: myCommandHandler
  }
};
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "manifestjson-1"
    }}>{`manifest.json`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-json"
      }}>{`{
  // ...
  main: "index.js",
  // ...
  "entrypoints": [
   {
      "type": "command",
      "id": "myCommand",
      "label": "This is a Command"
    }
  ],
  // ...
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "summary"
    }}>{`Summary`}</h2>
    <p>{`Commands create menu items in the `}<strong parentName="p">{`Window > UXP Plugins > `}<inlineCode parentName="strong">{`<pluginName>`}</inlineCode></strong>{` menu that users can click to execute any code, with an optional modal dialog UI.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Key Steps:`}</strong></p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Register the entrypoint`}</strong>{`: Add a `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`command`}</inlineCode>{`-type entrypoint to `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`manifest.json`}</inlineCode>{` with an `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`id`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`label`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Create the handler`}</strong>{`: Write a JavaScript function to execute when the command is invoked.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Associate entrypoint and handler`}</strong>{`: Use either`}
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`entrypoints.setup()`}</inlineCode>{`: Recommended for plugins with multiple entrypoint types.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul"><inlineCode parentName="li">{`module.exports`}</inlineCode>{`: Simpler approach for plugins with only commands.`}</li>
        </ul>
      </li>
    </ol>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
